text.title: Requirements Lifecycle Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: How large is the requirements set?

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.

branch.question: Does the tracking tool support state workflow?

conclusion.verdict: Encode states + transitions in the tool; policy doc references the tool config.
Maintain policy as a markdown contract; manual transitions logged in register.

example.trace: size=45 → supports=true (Jira workflow) → encode in Jira, policy references workflow ID.
